cartoons.headline: Tech giant announces AGI breakthrough at press conference
cartoons.setup: Yes, we achieved artificial general intelligence.
cartoons.caption: Yes, we achieved artificial general intelligence. Also we have no water.

cartoons.headline: Company replaces entire QA team with AI agent
cartoons.setup: The AI found 10,000 bugs on its first day.
cartoons.caption: The AI found 10,000 bugs on its first day. 9,997 of them were in itself.

cartoons.headline: Survey finds 80% of AI-generated code needs human review
cartoons.setup: We trained the model on every coding tutorial ever written.
cartoons.punchline: It now starts every function with TODO: finish this later.
cartoons.caption: We trained the model on every coding tutorial ever written. It now starts every function with TODO: finish this later.
